title: hypericum × cyathiflorum
intro: Hypericum × cyathiflorum is a hybrid plant species within the St. John's Wort family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and four-petaled corolla. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Hypericum × cyathiflorum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
